assertionResults.evidence: cargo build -p sd-core succeeded; cargo test -p sd-core test_structural_tension_accepts_now_parameter passed; compute_structural_tension signature includes now: DateTime<Utc> (sd-core/src/dynamics.rs).
cargo test -p sd-core test_detect_resolution_velocity_units_gap_per_second passed; cargo test -p sd-core test_detect_resolution_is_sufficient_correct_boolean passed.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_003_willpower_burst_scales_by_horizon ... ok.

cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_004_structural_change_window_horizon_scaled ... ok; implementation scales structural_change_window via effective_recency in detect_compensating_strategy.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_005_momentum_window_scales_by_horizon ... ok.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_006_classify_orientation_horizon_scaling ... ok; classify_orientation uses effective_recency with each tension.horizon in implementation.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_007_conflict_narrow_threshold_configurable ... ok.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_008_neglect_urgency_symmetric ... ok.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_009_configurable_lifecycle_urgency_thresholds ... ok and test_val_dfx_009_configurable_tendency_urgency_threshold ... ok.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_010_neglect_considers_children_horizons ... ok.
cargo test --package sd-core passed: unit 623 passed, integration 18 passed, store_discovery 10 passed, doctests 1 passed.
cargo test -p sd-core test_structural_tension_forwards_now_to_temporal_pressure passed (different now values produce different pressure).
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_013_neglect_urgency_amplification_configurable ... ok.
cargo test -p sd-core val_dfx includes test_val_dfx_014_configurable_burst_stagnation_thresholds ... ok.
cargo test -p sd-core recalibrated passed: test_canonical_lifecycle_with_recalibrated_thresholds ... ok, plus boundary/value recalibration tests ... ok.

commandsRun.observation: Resolution sufficiency boolean behavior test passed.
3 recalibration tests passed, including canonical lifecycle scenario.

frictions.description: Repeated non-fatal Rust warnings (unused imports/variables in sd-core/src/dynamics.rs tests) appear in test output and add noise while validating assertions.
frictions.resolution: Continued validation since warnings did not block compilation or test execution.

summary: Validated VAL-DFX-001 through VAL-DFX-015 via targeted cargo build/tests plus full sd-core test suite; all 15 assertions passed with no blockers.
